title: Chinese companies win licensing bids to explore Iraq oil and gas fields | Reuters
description: Chinese companies won bids to explore five Iraqi oil and gas fields on Saturday in a licensing round for hydrocarbon exploration that was primarily aimed at ramping up gas production for domestic use.
bodyText: Reporting by Moayed Kenany, Clauda Tanios, Adam Makary and Timour Azhari; Writing by Timour Azhari; Editing by Alison Williams, Mark Potter and Emelia SIthole-Matarise Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., opens new tab
